_instructions: Review and adjust the default policy values below to match your organisation's supply chain rules for this study.

safety_stock._comment: Minimum weeks of supply to maintain at each location. Increase for high-risk studies or long lead times.

reorder_rules._comment: When weeks of supply drops to this level, trigger replenishment. Must be greater than safety stock to account for lead time.

maximum_stock_levels._comment: Maximum weeks of supply at any location. Prevents over-ordering. Adjust based on shelf life and budget.

budget.budget_envelope: TODO: total supply chain budget as a number, e.g. 1500000
budget.currency: TODO: e.g. USD or EUR or GBP
budget._comment: Set budget_envelope to null if budget tracking is not required for this study.

expiry_rules._comment: Default minimum remaining shelf life at time of shipment. Country-specific overrides are in reference/shelf_life_by_country.json.

destruction_eligibility._comment: Stock meeting any of these conditions may be eligible for destruction, subject to verification that no open patients need the stock.

sop_references.description: TODO: brief description of what this SOP governs
